metadata.description: Autonomous E2E QA engine for Claude Code — 13 specialized agents, 11 MCP tools, Zero-Token Bypass via SHA-256 + Ollama. Scout · Artisan · Coroner · Ghostwriter · Evolver · Sentinel (OWASP) · ChaosMonkey · ArchPolice · Dependabot · RGPD Guard · Jira/Trello/Slack/OVH integrations.

plugins.name: test-end-to-end
plugins.description: 10 slash commands: /e2e-init · /e2e-audit · /e2e-coverage · /e2e-update · /e2e-diff · /e2e-repair · /e2e-shadow · /e2e-sentinel · /e2e-arch · /e2e-chaos. 11 MCP tools. Playwright · Cypress · Selenium · Robot Framework. Level 1 (0 token) → Level 3 (auto-patch PR + OWASP audit + chaos + deployment).
